description: One starter multiple-choice source item with the required fields wired in.

items.stem: Use this starter item as a placeholder and replace the text with the curated source you want to distill.

solution_steps.label: Check the domain
solution_steps.content: Record the domain restriction before combining logarithms.

solution_steps.label: Combine the logarithms
solution_steps.content: Rewrite the sum of logarithms as one equation.

solution_steps.label: Filter the roots
solution_steps.content: Solve the equation and discard roots outside the domain.

solution_steps.label: Map to the choice
solution_steps.content: Convert the surviving value into the correct choice index.

distractors.trigger: When the domain is not written down first.
distractors.wrong_move: Keep an extraneous root produced by the transformed equation.
distractors.plausible_choice_shape: An answer choice tied to the extraneous root

style_notes: Replace the placeholder stem and choices before distillation.
Keep the domain check explicit when you curate logarithm items.
